title: Blueprint Swarm - Call Extraction
description: Per-call output schema for extracting structured intelligence from sales/CS call transcripts

call_id.description: Unique identifier for the call (Gong ID, filename hash, or sequential ID)

classification.description: Call type classification based on content analysis

account_name.description: Company or account name associated with the call

call_date.description: Date of the call in YYYY-MM-DD format

name.description: Participant name as identified in transcript

role.description: Participant role (e.g., AE, CSM, VP Sales, Champion, Economic Buyer, End User)

company.description: Company the participant belongs to (seller or buyer side)

side.description: Which side of the deal the participant is on

participants.description: All identified participants in the call

theme.description: Concise label for the pain theme (e.g., 'Manual reporting wastes 10+ hours/week')

verbatim_quotes.description: Exact quotes from the transcript that evidence this pain theme

severity.description: How severe this pain is based on language intensity, frequency, and business impact

pain_themes.description: All pain points, frustrations, and challenges mentioned in the call

engagement_level.description: How engaged the champion appears based on talk time, question quality, and advocacy signals

signals.description: Specific signals of champion behavior (e.g., 'Volunteered to schedule follow-up', 'Referenced internal advocacy')

champion_profile.description: Profile of the strongest internal champion identified on the call

context.description: Context in which the competitor was mentioned

verbatim_quote.description: Exact quote where the competitor was mentioned

competitive_mentions.description: All mentions of competitors during the call

objection.description: The objection raised by the prospect/customer

response.description: How the seller responded to the objection

outcome.description: Whether the objection was resolved, left unresolved, or escalated

objection_handling.description: All objections raised and how they were handled

mentioned.description: Whether pricing was discussed on the call

context.description: Context of pricing discussion (e.g., 'Prospect asked for discount', 'Sticker shock on enterprise tier')

details.description: Specific pricing details mentioned (amounts, tiers, comparisons)

pricing_notes.description: Any pricing-related discussion on the call

sentiment_trajectory.description: Overall sentiment trajectory across the call — did the prospect/customer warm up or cool down?

key_quotes.description: Top 3-5 most insightful verbatim quotes from the call that capture the essence of the conversation

summary.description: 2-3 sentence summary of the call covering the main topic, outcome, and next steps
